$comment: Midnight Phonk pack — Memphis / drift phonk, 150 BPM, C minor. Cowbell leads, distorted 808s, cassette grit. FULL PACK: 48 items (32 loops = 8 each of drums/bass/melody/vocals across banks A+B; 16 one-shots = 8 drumFills + 8 fx). Structural prompt envelope per docs/authoring-packs.md § Prompt templates; constraints per docs/audio-kits.md. Bank A drums/bass/melody/fx use the legacy 1-indexed names (drums-1..4, fx-1..4); everything else uses <color>-<bank>-<index>. The first 9 items (drums-1/2, bass-1/2, melody-1/2, vocals-A-0, fills-A-0, fx-1) were the original representative-subset run and are kept verbatim.

items.prompt: Memphis phonk drum loop, 150 BPM, C minor key context, 8 bars. Punchy kick on beats 1 and 3, hard clap and snare on beats 2 and 4, fast trap hi-hats with occasional 16th-note rolls, signature metallic cowbell ticking the off-beats. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Distorted, gritty cassette-tape texture. Classic Memphis drift-phonk character. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Drift phonk drum loop, 150 BPM, C minor key context, 8 bars. Hard-hitting kick on beat 1 and the and-of-2, punchy snare on beats 2 and 4, aggressive triplet hi-hat rolls, driving cowbell pattern on every off-beat 8th. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Crunchy, saturated, lo-fi tape distortion. High-energy drift-phonk character. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Cowbell-heavy phonk drum loop, 150 BPM, C minor key context, 8 bars. Booming kick on beats 1 and 3, tight rimshot snare on beats 2 and 4, busy trap hi-hats with stuttered 32nd-note rolls, a loud metallic cowbell driving a galloping off-beat pattern throughout. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Saturated cassette-tape grit. Memphis drift-phonk character. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Half-time phonk drum loop, 150 BPM, C minor key context, 8 bars. Heavy slow kick on beat 1, massive crushed snare landing on beat 3 (half-time feel), sparse trap hi-hats with the occasional fast roll, cowbell accents on the off-beats. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Crunchy, overdriven lo-fi tape distortion. Dark drift-phonk character. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Phonk distorted 808 bass loop, 150 BPM, in C minor, 8 bars. A continuous sustained distorted 808 sub holds the root C1 unbroken through all 8 bars and never drops to silence, but it is RE-STRUCK with a hard accented attack exactly on beat 1 of every bar so the single loudest moment of each bar is its downbeat. The downbeat of bar 1 is the loudest moment of the whole loop. No gaps, no silence between notes, fully continuous and even in level between downbeats. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no gaps, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Saturated, overdriven 808 with cassette grit. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Phonk sub bass loop, 150 BPM, in C minor, 8 bars. The downbeat of bar 1 is the loudest moment of the whole loop. No gaps, no silence between notes, fully continuous and even in level between downbeats. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no gaps, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Warm, dark analog sub. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Phonk gliding 808 bass loop, 150 BPM, in C minor, 8 bars. A distorted 808 holds the root C1 continuous and unbroken through all 8 bars and never drops to silence, re-struck with a hard accented attack exactly on beat 1 of every bar, with a short pitch glide up to the C1 root at the start of each bar. The downbeat of bar 1 is the loudest moment of the whole loop. No gaps, no silence between notes, fully continuous and even in level between downbeats. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no gaps, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Saturated, overdriven 808 with tape grit. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Phonk cowbell melody loop, 150 BPM, in C minor, 8 bars. A clean, smooth cowbell lead plays a dark minor-pentatonic riff in C minor (C-Eb-G-Eb-F-Eb-C) across each bar with gentle rounded note attacks. Strong, accented attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Bars 1 through 6 keep this exact pattern locked. Bar 7 adds a single ghost grace note. Bar 8 is a turnaround that lands back on the C minor root. Continuous melody across all 8 bars; no silent bars, no fades. Loopable. Smooth, mellow cowbell with light tape warmth and no digital distortion or clipping. Just cowbell, no drums, no bass, no vocals.

Phonk dark piano loop, 150 BPM, in C minor, 8 bars. A haunting muted grand piano plays a somber Cm-Ab-Bb-Gm chord progression with a single-note melody on top. Strong, accented attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Bars 1 through 6 keep this exact pattern locked. Bar 7 adds a single ghost high note. Bar 8 is a turnaround that lands on the C minor chord. Continuous melody across all 8 bars; no silent bars, no fades. Loopable. Lo-fi, dusty, detuned cassette piano. Just piano, no drums, no bass, no vocals.
